name: Sean Kim
degree: Bachelor of Applied Science in Computer Engineering
schoolDetails: Courses focused in **ML/AI**, **Software Engineering**, and **Computer Networks**
description:
I am an undergraduate **Computer Engineering** Student at the **University of Toronto**, also pursuing a minor in Artificial Intelligence. I am expected to graduate in June 2026.

 

I am currently working as a Software Engineering Intern at **Mozilla Corporation** on **Firefox** Networking (Necko) Team. I have previously worked as a research intern at **iQua Research Group** in Summer 2023. I have led various student teams in academic, hackathon, and professional environments to develop a variety of software and applications across different levels. I am passionate about software development, distributed systems, computer networks, and computer architecture.

 

Aside from work, I am a huge soccer/football (⚽) and hockey fan, a supporter of **Tottenham Hotspur FC**, **Toronto FC**, and the **Toronto Maple Leafs**. On weekends, I spend my time watching the **Premier League** and playing **FPL**.

 

This website serves as an archive where I can revisit past projects and experiences. I built it with **React** a few years ago—hope you enjoy the design!

 

I'm happy to connect if you have any project ideas or would like to chat!
